services.name: CHU de Toulouse - Hôpital Purpan
services.notes: Major teaching hospital, 24/7 emergency, trauma center, English-speaking staff available

services.name: Grande Pharmacie de la Place du Capitole
services.notes: Central pharmacy, wide stock, some English spoken, open Mon-Sat

services.name: Monoprix Toulouse Centre
services.notes: City center supermarket, fresh produce, prepared foods, daily essentials

services.name: BNP Paribas Toulouse Capitole
services.notes: Full-service branch, ATM 24/7, English-speaking advisors by appointment

services.name: Maison de Santé Saint-Cyprien
services.notes: Multi-practitioner clinic, Doctolib booking, some English-speaking GPs

services.name: Centre Dentaire Toulouse Jean Jaurès
services.notes: Modern dental clinic, general and cosmetic, Doctolib appointments

services.name: Clinique Vétérinaire du Capitole
services.notes: Full-service vet clinic, small animal specialist, emergency referrals

services.name: Jardin des Plantes de Toulouse
services.notes: 7-hectare botanical garden and park, dogs allowed on leash, playground, duck pond

services.name: Fitness Park Toulouse Centre
services.notes: 24/7 gym, modern equipment, group classes, flexible memberships

services.name: Christ Church Toulouse (Anglican)
services.notes: English-language Anglican services, active expat community

services.name: Toulouse International Community (TIC)
services.notes: Expat social group, Airbus community integration, regular meetups

services.name: Aéroport Toulouse-Blagnac (TLS)
services.notes: International airport, flights across Europe, airport shuttle and tram to city center

services.name: Gare de Toulouse-Matabiau
services.notes: TGV station, 4h10 to Paris, metro and bus connections, regional trains

services.name: La Cantine Toulouse
services.notes: Tech-focused coworking space, day passes, community events, fast WiFi

services.name: Toilettage Canin Toulouse Centre
services.notes: Dog and cat grooming, appointment-based, central location

services.name: Dog Resort Toulouse
services.notes: Dog daycare and boarding, outdoor play areas, pickup service available

services.name: Carrefour
services.notes: Mainstream hypermarket chain, countrywide.

services.name: Lidl
services.notes: German discount grocer — widespread in France.

services.name: Fnac Darty
services.notes: Combined electronics + appliances + books chain.

services.notes: Major home-improvement chain.

attractions.name: Cité de l'Espace
attractions.description: Space-themed interactive museum with planetarium, real Mir station, Ariane 5 rocket replica

attractions.name: Basilique Saint-Sernin
attractions.description: Largest remaining Romanesque church in Europe, UNESCO World Heritage, 11th century
attractions.frequency: Open daily, free entry to nave, crypt visits available

attractions.name: Canal du Midi
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage canal, 240km of tree-lined towpaths for cycling, walking, and boating

attractions.name: Marché Victor Hugo
attractions.description: Iconic covered market with fresh produce, charcuterie, cheese, and upstairs restaurants

attractions.name: Airbus Factory Tour (Manatour)
attractions.description: Guided tour of Airbus A380 assembly line, see aircraft being built from start to finish
attractions.frequency: Mon-Sat, advance booking required, tours in English available

attractions.name: Musée des Augustins
attractions.description: Fine arts museum in a Gothic monastery, sculpture from Roman to modern, paintings collection

attractions.name: Place du Capitole
attractions.description: Grand central square surrounded by cafés, site of weekly markets and cultural events

attractions.name: Jardin Japonais de Toulouse
attractions.description: Tranquil Japanese garden with tea pavilion, koi ponds, zen rock garden

attractions.name: Stadium de Toulouse
attractions.description: Home of Stade Toulousain (rugby) and Toulouse FC (football), major match venue
attractions.frequency: Match days, rugby season Sep-Jun, football Aug-May

attractions.name: Couvent des Jacobins
attractions.description: 13th-century Dominican monastery with extraordinary palm-tree vault and resting place of Thomas Aquinas
